## Type of Change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs (documentation only)
- [ ] test (adding or updating tests)
- [ ] chore (build/tooling changes)
- [ ] refactor (no functional change)

## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run test:unit` passes
- [ ] `bun run test:all` passes
- [ ] `bun packages/lythoskill-creator/src/cli.ts align` passes
- [ ] If `packages/<name>/skill/` was edited, `build --all` was run and `skills/` is committed
- [ ] If README was changed, check `README.zh.md` for sync needs
- [ ] If ADR/Epic/Task files were changed, `cortex index` was run
